mapper.sql: id ,internet_mno_id ,prod_name ,channel_count ,internet_speed ,GET_CODE_NAME('internet_speed', internet_speed) AS internetSpeedName ,normal_price ,combination_price ,normal_freeble_price ,combination_freeble_price ,use_yn ,manager ,create_date ,create_id ,GET_ADMIN_USER_NM(create_id) as createNm ,modified_date ,modified_id ,GET_ADMIN_USER_NM(modified_id) as modifiedNm ,stress_txt
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM tb_pmb_internet_plan_list
ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT id ,name ,mno_logo ,manager ,use_yn ,alam_rcv_num FROM tb_pmb_internet_mno WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id ,title ,top_banner ,foot_banner ,foot_bar_text ,btn_cta ,btn_color ,use_yn ,rd_url ,create_date ,create_id ,modified_date ,modified_id ,GET_ADMIN_USER_NM(create_id) as createNm ,GET_ADMIN_USER_NM(modified_id) as modifiedNm FROM tb_pmb_internet_rdp WHERE id = #{id}
